type.desc:
## ❌ Image Upload Failed!
Please upload a valid image file (image/* only).

error.no_api_key: ❌ **Storage API key not configured.** Please set `KYTHIA_IMAGE_STORAGE_API_KEY` in your environment.

found.desc:
## ❌ Image Not Found!
The image code could not be found or you do not have permission to delete it.

error.desc:
## ❌ Error Deleting Image!
An error occurred while trying to delete the image. Please try again later.

success.desc:
## ✅ Image Deleted!
The image has been deleted successfully.

list.empty: You have not uploaded any images yet.

title.text:
## 📷 **Your Uploaded Images**
Here are all the images you've uploaded:

footer.help: Use the filenames above with the image commands to show or delete your uploaded images.
